caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey sculpted hairstyle, wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders, speaks while seated in a podcast studio. He wears over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black microphone. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous small framed photographs and a yellow shirt with "LEE" printed on it. To the left, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and similar red text "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the right side of the frame. As the scene progresses, the man continues talking, with his facial expressions shifting slightly. In the final frames, he leans forward slightly, and his right arm moves across his chest, with his hand becoming visible near the bottom left of the frame.
